economic_notes: Nation has 28 Government Business Enterprises including energy services, catering, security, environmental, casino, hotel, sawmill, land corporation and oilfield services companies. GBE aggregate revenue was $93,768,207 in 2021. Nation provided $39,050,000 in limited guarantees on GBE credit facilities with $34,500,000 outstanding.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to obtain sufficient audit evidence on GBE investments accounted for under modified equity method - this qualification also applied to prior year 2020. Nation has 28 GBEs with aggregate assets of $190M and revenues of $93.7M, accounted for by modified equity method (not consolidated). Consolidated reporting entity includes Cold Lake First Nations, Cold Lake First Nations FNDF Corporation, and Nu Ch'anie Society. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $21,009,368 + FNIHB $6,032,578 + FNDF $2,382,857 + Other government grants $2,082,233 + Dene Ts'edi Society grants $909,435 = $32,416,471. OSR calculated as total revenue $34,478,017 minus government transfers $32,416,471 = $2,061,546. Contributions carried forward lines are netting items on revenue. Deferred revenue is presented as contributions carried forward on balance sheet. Interest payable to Primrose Lake Trust of $6,699,413 is included in accounts payable. Auditor firm not explicitly named in the document text provided but based on Edmonton-based firm and typical CLFN auditor - noted as unknown; set to empty string.
